create.description: Generate tasks, task groups, users, and duty shifts with a [DEMO] prefix.

demoData.createSuccess: Created {tasks} tasks, {groups} groups, {users} users, {shifts} shifts, and {bookings} bookings.

delete.description: Remove all demo data from the system.

delete.title: Delete Demo Data

demoData.deleteSuccess: Deleted {tasks} tasks, {groups} groups, {users} users, {shifts} shifts, and {bookings} bookings.

approvalPassword.clearDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to clear the approval password? Pending users will no longer be able to self-approve.
